since_last: 36% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.48%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.56% · BTC -0.61% · Gold +0.45% · Nasdaq100 -1.16%. 36% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.48%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.48%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.36%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -11.85%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +6.07%, LEU +4.06%, ZS +2.92%, PANW +2.56%, OKTA +2.50%. Laggards: ISRG -11.85%, UPST -4.53%, PUBM -4.37%, META -4.37%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.38% at $126.68
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.38% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
